title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: This video tells the story of Kalshi, a regulated financial exchange for event-based predictions founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara. After four years of fighting regulatory battles and eventually suing the CFTC, the startup achieved a $22 billion valuation and scaled rapidly to millions of customers.
